analysis.summary: A sweaty, raw dancehall anthem celebrating a confident 'crew' in a smoky Brooklyn-to-Kingston club where drinking rum and flashing gold chains fuel an intense, non-stop party vibe.

keywords.imageryPrompt: Shimmering liquid gold swirling in a crystal cup, reflecting neon club lights on wet skin.
Thick blue-grey cigarette smoke curling through the air of a dimly lit basement room with hanging light fixtures.
Deep amber liquid sloshing in tilted red plastic cups, condensation dripping onto wooden tables.
A tight-knit group of dancers moving in perfect sync within a crowded dance floor filled with sweat and energy.
Silhouette of hips swaying rhythmically against a backdrop of deep purple shadows and strobe light flares.
Heat waves distorting the view in a packed nightclub, glowing skin tones under intense overhead lighting.

styleHint: 90s dancehall party riddim with hip-hop flavor, dirty analog drums, punchy boom-bap kick layer, deep rolling sub bass, skanking guitar chops, sharp piano stabs, organ bubbles, brass hits, record scratches, vinyl warmth, air horn accents, male ragga deejay and sexy female dancehall vocalist trading short call-and-response chants, smoky basement party energy, Brooklyn-meets-Kingston sound system vibe, drinking, smoking, grinding, gold imagery, remixable hook sections, DJ-friendly intro and outro, minimal verses, nonstop one-shots, sweaty nightclub bounce, raw confident attitude
